hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: browser
options.description: If specified, opens the webpage in the browser.

options.name: max-connections
options.description: The number of maximum allowed connections.

options.name: subdomain
options.description: The name of the subdomain to use, if not specified a random subdomain name is used.

options.name: server
options.description: The hostname of the server to use.

options.name: host
options.description: The host to proxy requests to.

options.name: port
options.description: The port to proxy requests to.

options.name: receive-buffer-size
options.description: The minimum number of bytes to use for the receive buffer.

options.name: passthrough
options.description: If specified, the request is proxied as received and no HTTP headers are reinterpreted.

commands.name: http
commands.description: Starts a tunnel that exposes a HTTP server.

commands.name: https
commands.description: Starts a tunnel that exposes a HTTPS server.

options.name: allow-untrusted-certificates
options.description: Specifies whether untrusted certificates are allowed (use only for development/testing purposes).
